TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == caket == ŚĪĪÁĺĆ siwkay nu caket u kidu nu caket mahiza u adidi'ay a ngabul, singawa i ayaw nu tangah, u kulit sa malecad tu. iayaw sa miadup tu caket ku Sakizaya a miadupay. ayzasa, caay kayadah tu ku caket i buyu, amana miadup satu ku sefu nu mita. u sulit nu Hulam atu Amilika The Reeves's muntjac (Muntiacus reevesi; Chinese: ŚĪĪÁĺĆ) is a muntjac species found widely in southeastern China (from Gansu to Yunnan) and Taiwan. It has also been introduced in Belgium, the Netherlands, the United Kingdom (south England, the Midlands,, east Wales), Ireland, and Japan. It takes its name from John Reeves, an employee of the British East India Company in the 19th century.
S.PHON: == ¶ak…ôt == ** siwkaj nu ¶ak…ôt u kidu nu ¶ak…ôt mańßiza u adidi Ē~ °aj a Ňčabur~…ĺ, siŇčawa i ajaw nu taŇčańß, u kur~…ĺit sa mar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad tu. iajaw sa miadup tu ¶ak…ôt ku sakizaja a miadupaj. ajzasa, ¶aaj kajadańß tu ku ¶ak…ôt i buju, amana miadup satu ku s…ôfu nu mita. u sur~…ĺit nu ńßur~…ĺam atu amir~…ĺika tńß…ô *…ô…ô*…ôs Ē~ °s muntja ¶ (muntia ¶us r…ô…ô*…ôsi; ¶ńßin…ôs…ô: **) is a muntja ¶ sp…ô ¶i…ôs found wid…ôr~…ĺj in soutńß…ôast…ôrn ¶ńßina (from gansu to junnan) and taiwan. it ńßas ar~…ĺso b…ô…ôn introdu ¶…ôd in b…ôr~…ĺgium, tńß…ô n…ôtńß…ôrr~…ĺands, tńß…ô unit…ôd kiŇčdom (soutńß …ôŇčr~…ĺand, tńß…ô midr~…ĺands,, …ôast war~…ĺ…ôs), ir…ôr~…ĺand, and *apan. it tak…ôs its nam…ô from *ońßn *…ô…ô*…ôs, an …ômpr~…ĺoj…ô…ô of tńß…ô britisńß …ôast india ¶ompanj in tńß…ô **tńß ¶…ônturj.
S.FORM: == caket == ŚĪĪÁĺĆ siwkay nu caket u kidu nu caket mahiza u adidi'ay a ngabul, singawa i ayaw nu tangah, u kulit sa malecad tu. iayaw sa miadup tu caket ku Sakizaya a miadupay. ayzasa, caay kayadah tu ku caket i buyu, amana miadup satu ku sefu nu mita. u sulit nu Hulam atu Amilika The Reeves's muntjac (Muntiacus reevesi; Chinese: ŚĪĪÁĺĆ) is a muntjac species found widely in southeastern China (from Gansu to Yunnan) and Taiwan. It has also been introduced in Belgium, the Netherlands, the United Kingdom (south England, the Midlands,, east Wales), Ireland, and Japan. It takes its name from John Reeves, an employee of the British East India Company in the 19th century.
S.PHON: == ¶ak…ôt == ** siwkaj nu ¶ak…ôt u kidu nu ¶ak…ôt mańßiza u adidi Ē~ °aj a Ňčabur~…ĺ, siŇčawa i ajaw nu taŇčańß, u kur~…ĺit sa mar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad tu. iajaw sa miadup tu ¶ak…ôt ku sakizaja a miadupaj. ajzasa, ¶aaj kajadańß tu ku ¶ak…ôt i buju, amana miadup satu ku s…ôfu nu mita. u sur~…ĺit nu ńßur~…ĺam atu amir~…ĺika tńß…ô *…ô…ô*…ôs Ē~ °s muntja ¶ (muntia ¶us r…ô…ô*…ôsi; ¶ńßin…ôs…ô: **) is a muntja ¶ sp…ô ¶i…ôs found wid…ôr~…ĺj in soutńß…ôast…ôrn ¶ńßina (from gansu to junnan) and taiwan. it ńßas ar~…ĺso b…ô…ôn introdu ¶…ôd in b…ôr~…ĺgium, tńß…ô n…ôtńß…ôrr~…ĺands, tńß…ô unit…ôd kiŇčdom (soutńß …ôŇčr~…ĺand, tńß…ô midr~…ĺands,, …ôast war~…ĺ…ôs), ir…ôr~…ĺand, and *apan. it tak…ôs its nam…ô from *ońßn *…ô…ô*…ôs, an …ômpr~…ĺoj…ô…ô of tńß…ô britisńß …ôast india ¶ompanj in tńß…ô **tńß ¶…ônturj.
